hero.title: Shaping a sustainable and resilient future.
hero.subtitle: A leader in engineering, consulting, and design, we transform complex challenges into innovative opportunities for our clients and society.

about.title: Our Business
about.content1: CEEB is an independent, multidisciplinary global consulting firm dedicated to sustainable excellence in the built environment. Since our inception, we have been committed to providing creative, high-value solutions that have a positive impact on the world.
about.content2: Our core values of quality, integrity, and creativity guide our every action. We believe in a holistic approach to design, where collaboration across disciplines is the key to success.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We support companies with tailor-made engineering, consulting, and project management solutions.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.desc: Our engineering expertise covers structural, civil, mechanical, electrical, and facade engineering.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.desc: We offer comprehensive project management services from planning to delivery.

audit.title: Audit & Consulting
audit.desc: We conduct technical audits, performance evaluations, and risk analyses.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: We develop communication strategies to engage stakeholders and promote projects.

elearning.title: E-learning
elearning.desc: We create customized e-learning solutions for organizations.

digital.title: Digital Solutions
digital.desc: We develop innovative digital solutions including BIM, analytics, and AI.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Discover a selection of our flagship projects.

project1.title: Sustainable renovation of a historic building
project1.desc: Transformation of an architectural heritage into a high-energy performance building.

project2.title: Design of a new urban transport line
project2.desc: Modern transport infrastructure to improve urban mobility.

project3.title: Digital platform for asset management
project3.desc: Innovative digital solution for infrastructure management.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join a team shaping the world of tomorrow.
careers.content: At Ceeb, we offer a stimulating work environment where creativity and initiative are encouraged.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have a project or a question?
contact.content: Contact us to discuss how we can help you achieve your ambitions.

footer.description: A leader in engineering, consulting, and design for a sustainable future.
